_note: Static fallback data — used when live ArcGIS server is unavailable. Data sourced from public records.

properties.Description: Lusaka Dolomite Aquifer — major urban supply aquifer underlying Lusaka; highly productive fractured/karst system
Kafue Flats Alluvial Aquifer — shallow alluvial deposits along Kafue River floodplain; seasonal recharge
Copperbelt Basement Fractured Aquifer — fractured crystalline basement underlying mining towns; moderate yield
Solwezi/Kansanshi Fractured Aquifer — metamorphic basement fractures around Solwezi; supports mining operations
Barotse/Zambezi Floodplain Aquifer — large shallow alluvial aquifer of Zambezi/Barotse floodplain; good rural supply
Kabompo-Zambezi Alluvial System — sandy alluvial deposits along upper Zambezi and Kabompo tributaries
Luangwa Valley Alluvial Aquifer — productive alluvial deposits along Luangwa River valley; key irrigation source
Eastern Plateau Fractured Basement — fractured basement aquifer on Nyika/Chipata plateau; rural borehole supply
Bangweulu Basin Aquifer — shallow aquifer associated with Lake Bangweulu wetlands; high water table
Lake Tanganyika Rift Fractured Aquifer — fractured basement around Tanganyika basin; coastal borehole supply
Muchinga Escarpment Fractured Aquifer — deeply fractured metamorphic rocks on Muchinga escarpment; limited yield
Kafue Gorge Karoo Sedimentary Aquifer — confined sandstone aquifer in Karoo basin of Southern Province
Middle Zambezi Alluvial Aquifer — alluvial deposits along Zambezi between Kariba and Victoria Falls
Central Plateau Basement Aquifer — fractured basement underlying Central Province plateau farmlands
Mweru-Luapula Alluvial Aquifer — alluvial deposits along Luapula River and Lake Mweru shores; rural supply
